title: Smart Arrows
description: Arrow mechanics ricochet and teleportation system
body: Smart Arrows - Enhanced Arrow Physics for Minecraft Transform your archery experience with intelligent arrow mechanics! ![ricochet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Y1g7KIGm/images/5cc3030f4f8d358ebc7ae5ee239a91b02db9d2ef.gif) ![arrow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Y1g7KIGm/images/c6219c542ac501bf352f67160e3918ade08470ba.gif) ## ✨ Features ### 🎯 Ricochet System - **Smart Bouncing**: Arrows ricochet off surfaces at shallow angles - **Configurable Angle Threshold**: Adjust ricochet sensitivity (5-45 degrees) - **Multiple Bounces**: Set maximum ricochet count (1-8 bounces) - **Realistic Physics**: Energy loss with each bounce for authentic feel ### 🌟 Teleportation - **Crouch-to-Teleport**: Hold crouch while shooting to mark arrows for teleportation - **Smart Positioning**: Automatically finds safe teleport locations - **Instant Travel**: Teleport to your arrow's landing spot instantly - **Safety Checks**: Prevents teleporting into walls or dangerous areas(lava, water) ## 🎮 How to Use ### Ricochet Arrows Toggle G(press G) to open Menu 1. Enable ricochet in the config menu (default: ON) 2. Shoot arrows at walls at shallow angles 3. Watch them bounce off surfaces realistically! ### Teleport Arrows 1. Hold **Crouch** while drawing your bow 2. Shoot the arrow to your desired location 3. You'll instantly teleport when the arrow lands! ### Configuration - Press `G` to open the configuration menu in-game - Adjust ricochet angles and maximum bounces - Toggle features on/off as needed ![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c004934908e930e8f3d3c5519a5c50b17212d809_0.webp) ## ⚙️ Configuration Options | Setting | Default | Description | |---------|---------|-------------| | Ricochet Enabled | `true` | Enable/disable arrow ricocheting | | Angle Threshold | `15°` | Minimum angle for ricochet (5-45°) | | Max Ricochets | `3` | Maximum number of bounces (1-8) | | Teleport Enabled | `true` | Enable/disable teleportation feature | ## 🔧 Technical Details - **Client-Side Configuration**: Smooth GUI with real-time updates - **Server-Safe**: Works on multiplayer servers - **Performance Optimized**: Minimal impact on game performance - **Vanilla-Friendly**: Preserves normal arrow physics when features are disabled ## 📋 Requirements - **Minecraft**: 1.21.x - **Mod Loader**: Fabric - **Fabric API**: Latest version for 1.21.5 and >= 1.21.1 ## 🚀 Installation 1. Install Fabric Loader for Minecraft 1.21.x 2. Download and install Fabric API 3. Download Smart Arrows from Modrinth 4. Place the mod file in your `mods` folder 5. Launch Minecraft and enjoy enhanced archery!
